# Handled Studio
https://handledstudio.com.au

Handled Studio is a production design retainer for real estate agencies,
mortgage brokers, buyers agents, and property managers across Australia
and New Zealand.

## What we do
Monthly design output on retainer — listings, proposals, EDMs, social
media, and day-to-day marketing for property businesses. Senior, local
design without the overhead of an in-house hire. Run by Rosh Java,
15+ years across Ogilvy, M&C Saatchi, and Barfoot & Thompson.

## Sister studio
Ästhetik Studio (asthetik.studio) handles investor communications and
capital-market documents.

## Main pages
- /               Homepage
- /fully-handled  Service detail — what a retainer includes
- /work           Portfolio of work
- /about          About Rosh Java, founder
- /fit-check      Free 20-minute Fit Check booking

## Journal
15 articles on property marketing, design for real estate agencies,
design retainers vs freelancers, and construction tender documents.
https://handledstudio.com.au/journal
